_meta.notes: Phase 1 scoring only. Phase 2 sloppytoppy-rewrite reads this file but does not write. Re-scoring driven by content_hash mismatch. PROP-039 reference.

operator_interventions.reason: Rubric v1.1 added disable_sentence_complexity=true on this surface. Content_hash unchanged so normal stale-detection would not fire. Forcing rescore on next sloppytoppy-score run.
Content-dense flag policy change 2026-05-16: WIN surfaces are no longer content-dense eligible. Removed records to force rescore under new flag set (target_max 1.0x instead of 2.0x).

length_details.length_override_reason: 4+ sub-claims (61.46σ vs R²=0.0187 contradiction, taxonomy applied to 9/83, registry 28→39, AI-manifest disconnect, two-count bookkeeping), citation-heavy with 9 dome-site URLs and methodology.json references, kernel-of-truth audit walk-through.
